title: Great everyday hoodie
text: The fit feels relaxed without looking sloppy, and the fabric has enough weight to hold its shape through the day. It has become an easy piece to throw on for errands, travel and cooler evenings.

title: Soft and structured
text: I like that it feels soft inside but still looks clean from the outside. The oversized shape is roomy, so I would stay true to size unless you want an extra relaxed fit.

title: Black color looks sharp
text: The black version works with almost everything in my wardrobe. The hood sits nicely, the cuffs feel secure and the overall finish is better than I expected for daily wear.

title: Easy to wear all week
text: The hoodie feels substantial but not heavy. I have worn it with cargos and wide-leg sweatpants, and it keeps the same clean shape after a full day.

title: Best piece from my order
text: The cut is the main win here. It is oversized in the shoulders and body, but the cuffs and hem keep it from feeling too loose.

title: Good weight for evenings
text: I bought it for travel days and it works well for that. The fabric is warm enough for cooler evenings and still breathable indoors.

title: Holds its shape
text: After several wears, the hood and body still look structured. It feels like a proper staple rather than a hoodie that only looks good once.

title: Good layering piece
text: The wash gives it a worn-in look without feeling old. I mostly wear it open over tees, and it layers well under a jacket when the weather drops.

title: Boxy fit is exactly right
text: The tee has a strong shape and does not cling. It feels substantial but not stiff, which makes it useful on its own or under an overshirt.

title: Nice print, relaxed feel
text: The graphic is easy to style and the fabric feels comfortable. I wish the neckline was slightly tighter, but overall it works well for casual outfits.
